CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Type__c) ,'Assembly Event', IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Assembly_Maintenance_Event_Invoice__c),Today(), leaseworks__Assembly_Maintenance_Event_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c ) ,'MR Payment', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c ),Today(),leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c),Today())
CustomField.label: Invoice Date
